title: [Update Soon] Minecraft, But Dirt Drops OP Items
description: This Minecraft NeoForge Mod makes dirt drop Op Items like diamond, netherite etc.
body: This is Minecraft But Dirt Drops OP Items mod in which Dirt Drops Op Items like diamonds, netherite, end protal frames, Iron etc, this mod makes dirt op and makes the game easy, joyfull and fun. This mod is fun!.
